author: claude
content: Reshape complete. Pushed scratch bookmark stealth-reshaped (tip 3c9affd0) -> origin. HARD GATE PASSED: jj diff --from stealth-reshaped@origin --to feat/stealth-js-instrument-v2@origin is EMPTY (byte-identical tree). Original feat/stealth-js-instrument-v2 untouched at 0999ffcb. 5 commits master@origin..stealth-reshaped: (1) c1f8f79c docs ADR+design; (2) 456f27dc core instrument + receiver capture + detection/shared-proto tests; (3) 3c63f4be configurable surface + config tests; (4) 3ec08c0e legacy->stealth sweep + sweep tests; (5) 3c9affd0 universal-members flag + test. jj-precommit (isort/black/mypy/ESLint) all PASS on tip. Per-commit sanity: each commit's Python imports clean; commit2 extension builds (stealth.js emitted, xpi created); test_stealth.py collects the correct class subset at each commit (c2=39,c3=48,c4=65,c5=full); fast python-only tests pass per commit (c2 mutual-exclusion, c3 clean_stealth ConfigError, c4 TestStealthRecursiveRejected).
